hooks.command: bash -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/deny-dangerous.sh" ] || root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/deny-dangerous.sh" ] || { printf '\''{"decision":"deny","reason":"Policy hook unavailable: git repository root unavailable."}\n'\''; exit 0; }; cd "$root" || { printf '\''{"decision":"deny","reason":"Policy hook unavailable: git repository root unavailable."}\n'\''; exit 0; }; bash "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/deny-dangerous.sh"'
